news.t: REX Shares Launches New T-REX 2X Long CIFR Daily Target ETF (CBOE: CIFU)

overview.description: The T-REX 2X Long CIFR Daily Target ETF (CIFU) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Cipher Mining Inc. stock (NASDAQ: CIFR), less fees, and expenses CIFU was launched on Nov 21, 2025 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.

data.title: REX Shares Launches New T-REX 2X Long CIFR Daily Target ETF (CBOE: CIFU)
data.text: MIAMI--(BUSINESS WIRE)--REX Shares (“REX”), in collaboration with Tuttle Capital Management (“Tuttle”), is pleased to announce the launch of its newest leveraged single-stock ETF: the T-REX 2X Long CI...
